columns.name: Timestamp
columns.description: Date and time the agent information was recorded

columns.name: AgentId
columns.description: Unique identifier for the agent

columns.name: AgentName
columns.description: Display name of the agent

columns.name: Platform
columns.description: The platform that provided the information about the agent

columns.name: AgentDescription
columns.description: Description of the agent as displayed in the agent's source

columns.name: Version
columns.description: Version of the agent

columns.name: SourceAgentId
columns.description: Native identifier assigned by the platform where the agent originated

columns.name: EntraAgentId
columns.description: The agent's unique enterprise application object identifier by Microsoft Entra ID

columns.name: EntraBlueprintId
columns.description: The unique identifier by Microsoft Entra ID for the agent identity blueprint, which serves as the template from which the agent's identity was created

columns.name: ToolsAuthenticationType
columns.description: Structured summary of agent identity, authentication, and authorization model

columns.name: Permissions
columns.description: Permissions record of the agent, including those that have been requested and granted, their approval state, and consent enumeration

columns.name: PublishedStatus
columns.description: The agent's publication status; possible values: `Draft`, `Published

columns.name: LifecycleStatus
columns.description: The agent's current operational state in the tenant; possible values: `Active`, `Blocked`, `Uninstalled`, `Deleted

columns.name: Availability
columns.description: The deployment scope of the agent (that is, whether deployed to all users, specific groups, or individual users)

columns.name: CreatedDateTime
columns.description: Date and time when the agent was created

columns.name: LastPublishedDateTime
columns.description: Date and time when the agent was last published or deployed

columns.name: LastUpdatedDateTime
columns.description: Date and time when the agent's metadata was last modified

columns.name: Owners
columns.description: Primary owners of the agent

columns.name: SharedWith
columns.description: The users and security groups the agent has been shared with

columns.name: InstanceCount
columns.description: Number of agent instances created from the same Microsoft Entra ID agent identity blueprint

columns.name: Instructions
columns.description: The agent's system prompt that defines its default behavior, persona, and operating boundaries

columns.name: Model
columns.description: The AI model powering the agent

columns.name: Channels
columns.description: The channels or surfaces where the agent can operate, such as Microsoft 365 applications or APIs

columns.name: Capabilities
columns.description: The intents, actions, skills, and orchestrations of the agent

columns.name: DeclaredDataSources
columns.description: The data repositories and knowledge sources the agent can access

columns.name: DeclaredTools
columns.description: Functional tools the agent can invoke at runtime

columns.name: McpServers
columns.description: The Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers connected to the agent, including server URLs and credential configuration

columns.name: Skills
columns.description: Skills attached to the agent

columns.name: ConnectedAgents
columns.description: List of other agents connected to the agent for multi-agent orchestration

columns.name: Memory
columns.description: The agent's declarative memory store configuration

columns.name: Triggers
columns.description: List of the agent's triggers

columns.name: Guardrails
columns.description: Guardrails attached to the agent and their coverage

columns.name: Endpoints
columns.description: List of agent runtime endpoints, including URL, transport type, and external connectivity flag

columns.name: ObservabilityId
columns.description: Unique identifier used to correlate the agent with its usage and activity data in Microsoft Agent 365

columns.name: RawAgentInfo
columns.description: Additional information about the agent, in JSON format
